notableEvents.label: Patrick Bailey GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Patrick Bailey grounds into a double play, first baseman Kody Clemens to shortstop Brooks Lee to first baseman Kody Clemens. Travis Bazzana out at 2nd. Patrick Bailey out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Kendry Rojas on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Rhys Hoskins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins flies out to left fielder Trevor Larnach.

notableEvents.label: David Fry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: David Fry singles on a line drive to left fielder Trevor Larnach.

notableEvents.label: Rhys Hoskins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins grounds out, third baseman Royce Lewis to first baseman Kody Clemens.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Gavin Williams. Kody Clemens scores. Brooks Lee to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Luke Keaschall GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luke Keaschall grounds into a double play, third baseman Daniel Schneemann to second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Austin Martin out at 2nd. Luke Keaschall out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Austin Martin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Austin Martin grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Josh Bell out at 2nd. Austin Martin out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Victor Caratini flies out to right fielder Chase DeLauter.
